title: DVD release question
wikitext:
[]: DVD release question             Quote Post by Robowang » Thu Mar 12, 2020 9:42 am Has anyone picked up this particular set? (It's probably unofficial, but I'll support an official release if they ever print one again in the U.S.) I am curious if it uses the director's cut episodes or not. It doesn't say if it comes from the Platinum release or the first release. Thanks!

[]: Re: DVD release question             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Mar 12, 2020 9:46 am Well, with 26 episodes and two movies all on four disks, you're not going to get anywhere near the quality of any official release. Though the misspellings are fun, I suppose.

[]: Re: DVD release question             Quote Post by Robowang » Sat Mar 28, 2020 6:54 pm Well, I did pick this up afterall just to have a set. They actually fixed those typos at some point because mine is all spelled correctly. I knew it would be a bootleg; that doesn't bother me. I don't have my old ADV perfect collection anymore, so I can't say if it's a straight rip or not, but the quality isn't terrible...seems to be on par with what I remember of my old official set. The disk with the two movies, however, is interesting. The End of Eva has this live action opening I have read about, and I don't remember that being on my old official EoE dvd (again, no longer have it). Also, there are only black bars at the top and bottom. The sides reach the sides of my TV. The dub is obviously the old one, but I am not sure about the subs.
summary:
